title: Cheesecake Roll-Ups
excerpt: Ingredients 4 slices white bread 125 ml soft, plain cream cheese 30 ml icing sugar 45 ml melted butter 45 ml castor sugar 5 ml ground cinnamon Method Cut the crusts off the bread and roll each slice flat with a wine bottle or a rolling pin. Mix the cream cheese and icing sugar and spread over …
html:
Ingredients

  • 4 slices white bread
  • 125 ml soft, plain cream cheese
  • 30 ml icing sugar
  • 45 ml melted butter
  • 45 ml castor sugar
  • 5 ml ground cinnamon

Method

Cut the crusts off the bread and roll each slice flat with a wine bottle or a rolling pin.

Mix the cream cheese and icing sugar and spread over each slice of bread.

Roll up each slice and brush lightly all over with the melted butter.

Mix the sugar and cinnamon and sprinkle onto a plate.

Roll the bread rolls in the mixture to coat them all the way round with cinnamon sugar.

Pack the rolls onto a greased baking tray and bake at 180°C for 20 minutes or until crisp and golden brown.

Makes 4 rolls.

Easy!
